title: 30 Pcs Paper Party Bags, Gift and Sweet Bags with Handles, Kraft Bags with Stickers, Paper Party Bags for Kids Party, Celebrations, Baby Shower, Birthday, Halloween, Christmas -15 x 8 x 21 cm
features: 🍬30PCS Kraft Paper Bags: 30 paper party bags in 15 x 21 x 8cm/ 5.90 x 8.26 x 3.14inch (does not include the height of the handle). We offer a wide range of colour combinations / black combinations / brown combinations.Due to workmanship reasons, there is an obvious crease on the paper bag. If you mind, please don't buy it.

🍬Gigh Quality Material: Our party gift bags are made of 120 gsm environmentally friendly thick kraft paper. Paper party bags durable and foldable, easy to carry with a high quality strong twist handle for excellent carrying strength.
🍬30PCS Sealing Stickers: 30 PCS “Thank you” stickers. Sticky enough to hold bags closed. Each sticker measures 3cm/1.18 inch.

🍬Diy Paper Bags: Our gift bags are designed with uncoated paper so you can create all kinds of DIY and craft items such as painting, writing, printing, scrapbooking to decorate them and make them unique to you!

🍬Multi-purpose: Our paper party bags are perfect for all kinds of festivals, such as Christmas, Thanksgiving Day, Halloween, carnival, and also suitable for all kinds of parties, like birthday party, wedding parties, baby birthdays, graduation parties and other party gift packaging, can also be used as gift bags, candy bags, storage bags, shopping bags and takeaway bags etc.
